_description: Reproduction fixture for G10 (Gemma 4 preserve_thinking). A HISTORICAL assistant tool-call turn carries `reasoning` (HIST_REASONING_MARKER) before the last user message; a CURRENT assistant tool-call turn carries reasoning (CUR_REASONING_MARKER) after it. Gemma renders the dedicated reasoning field as a `<|channel>thought` block only for the current-turn region (loop.index0 > last_user_idx), so the historical reasoning is dropped by default. With preserve_thinking=true, the historical tool-call reasoning is rendered too — curing the multi-step agentic arguments-collapse.
_bug: earendil-works/pi#3325 (Qwen3.6 analog, = Q3.6-1); Gemma 4 reported in r/LocalLLaMA 12B tool-calling threads + Google PR HF disc #118 (unmerged).
